Por Pia Tod Spring Rolls
The fi lling for this recipe is Isaan-style chicken larb, which, I was surprised to learn, is not
typically seasoned with lime juice. That addition is a Bangkok thing. Instead, Isaan larb is meant

method: to be spicy and salty. In any case, you have the option of adding lime juice at the end, (just like
us Bangkokians). This recipe also works with ground pork.
